text:
On Fri, Apr 24, 1998 at 02:33:08PM -0400, Tim Vanderhoek wrote:
> On Tue, 21 Apr 1998 clkao@cirx.org wrote:
> > >Description:
> > 	The GNU Pascal compiler. Need gcc sources to compile.
> > 	I'm not so familiar with making ports, so there might be something
> > 	ugly or dirty, please give me commments or suggestions, I'll be
> > 	appreciated very much. :-)
> 
> Where is the actual port?

It could be found in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/gpc-port.tar.gz

--
Chia-liang Kao
